name: Asparagus Salad W/Pecans
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of water to a boil.
2. Wash the asparagus and snap off the tough bottoms of the stems.
3. When the water is boiling, add the asparagus and let it return to a boil.
4. Cook for about 3 minutes or until the asparagus is still crisp but tender.
5. Remove the asparagus and rinse under cold water. Refrigerate to chill.
6. At serving time, arrange lettuce leaves on salad plates.
7. Place 4 asparagus spears on each plate.
8. Drizzle with buttermilk mayonnaise and sprinkle 1 teaspoon of chopped pecans over the salads.
